speaker: charlie
text: That's a wrap on today's ParkSyde Bright Side. From sound waves fighting fires to corals getting genetic upgrades, science is absolutely smashing it in 2026.

speaker: alice
text: And the environmental tech we talked about today isn't just research anymore - it's actually being deployed in the real world. Ocean carbon capture, heat-resistant corals, these solutions are happening now.

speaker: charlie
text: Exactly right Jamie. While there's always challenges out there, the innovation and ingenuity we're seeing gives you real hope for the future. Good on the scientists and engineers making this stuff happen.

speaker: alice
text: Enjoy this gorgeous May weather South East Queensland, and we'll be back Monday with more bright side news. Have a brilliant weekend everyone!

speaker: charlie
text: Catch you later, this has been Alex Mercer and Jamie with ParkSyde Bright Side. Stay curious, stay positive, and keep looking for the bright side in everything. See ya!
